name: community-humanize-ppt
title: Humanize PPT
description: Presentation system for agent-made PPTs — born for the talk, not just the template. Turns raw material into an AST (audience-state-transfer) outline with per-page media decisions, hands a production brief to downstream renderers (HTML-PPT skills or native PPTX), then runs a capped 3-round presentation checkup on the rendered deck.

query.en: Turn my raw notes into a presentation outline that actually presents, then run a presentation checkup on the rendered deck
query.zh-CN: 把这份素材整理成能上台讲的 PPT 大纲，渲染完再做演讲体检
